prestazioni: 3.6L Pentastar V6 (ERC engine code) forced induction via Garrett GTX3582R turbocharger with 10.5 psi boost, custom 3-inch intercooler piping, and a Mishimoto aluminum intercooler core (part #MMINT-WRA-18) to handle 450+ WHP on E85 fuel

Full exhaust overhaul with a custom 3-inch stainless steel downpipe (fabricated by Burns Stainless) paired with a MagnaFlow Competition Series cat-back (part #16670) and a Borla Pro XS muffler (part #40862) for optimized scavenging and reduced backpressure

Holley Terminator X Max ECU (part #550-1121) with a custom tune by DiabloSport (CMR in-house calibration) for aggressive ignition timing, fuel mapping, and launch control, paired with a K&N Cold Air Intake (part #63-1568) for improved throttle response
estetica: Rigid Industries SR-Series 50-inch LED light bar (part #64050) mounted on a custom Poison Spyder JK-UR front bumper (part #PS-17-2X11-01) with integrated D-ring shackles and a Warn Zeon 10-S winch (part #103253)

AEV JK ProCal Module (part #30103001) recalibration for 37-inch Nitto Trail Grappler M/T tires (part #205-65-18) on Method MR701 wheels (17x9, +12mm offset) with a 2.5-inch AEV DualSport RT suspension lift (part #AEV30300200)

Custom Rock Hard 4x4 JK cage (part #RH4X4-JK-4DOOR-CAGE) with bolt-in X-factor gussets, painted in PPG Deltron Urethane (color code K39 'Gunmetal Gray'), paired with a Bestop Trektop NX Glide soft top (part #56853-35) in Black Diamond
